title: Strengthening Scalp Serum
body_html:
Fully restore scalp vitality from the root with the Black Garlic + Ceramides Strengthening Scalp Serum, an advanced leave-in treatment powered by ABG10+® Black Garlic Extract and Ceramides to repair the scalp’s natural barrier, fortify follicles, and stimulate healthy growth while protecting against environmental and oxidative stress.

Enriched with 3% Vitamin C, Biotin, Glutathione, and Silverfree™ Peptide, this high-efficacy serum delivers a powerful antioxidant and anti-aging effect that supports stronger, thicker, and shinier hair over time — while helping delay the appearance of grays for a more vibrant, youthful look.

Its water-based, lightweight and non-greasy texture absorbs quickly to rebalance and renew scalp functions, optimizing conditions for healthy hair growth while preventing dryness or irritation.

With consistent use, the scalp feels energized, follicles are reinforced, and hair appears denser, more radiant, and full of life.

Ideal for all scalp types, including sensitive scalps or those prone to thinning, breakage, or dullness.

title: Repairing Hair Mask
body_html:
Rebuild and restore damaged hair with the Black Garlic + Ceramides Repairing Mask, a highly restorative treatment designed to strengthen, hydrate, and protect brittle strands. Infused with ABG10+® Black Garlic Extract and innovative Ceramides, this intensive mask nourishes the hair fiber and rebuilds its inner structure, helping reduce breakage and split ends while improving elasticity, shine, and resilience.

Enriched with Mango Butter, Biotin, Hydrolyzed Rice Protein, Vegetable Collagen, and Vitamin E, it provides deep nourishment, reinforces the hair shaft, and protects strands from future chemical or mechanical stress. 

With each application, this transformative hair mask smooths and seals the cuticle to defend hair against external aggressors, leaving it soft, manageable, and visibly healthier. Ideal for dry, brittle, or chemically treated hair.

title: Invigorating Shampoo
body_html:
Discover the fusion of advanced actives and botanical innovation with our Black Garlic + Ceramides Invigorating Shampoo. A high-performance, sulfate-free formula designed to repair and fortify hair from its foundation: the scalp.
Powered by ABG10+® Aged Black Garlic Extract, a potent antioxidant complex, it nourishes follicles, stimulates microcirculation, and promotes stronger hair growth. Combined with Ceramides, biomimetic lipids that restore the scalp’s natural barrier, the formula locks in moisture, smooths the cuticle, and protects the scalp against external damage. Enriched with Vitamin E, Olive Oil, and Shea Butter, it delivers essential nutrients to maintain scalp balance, shine, and long-lasting resilience.
 With each wash, it gently removes impurities and buildup while optimizing scalp functions — creating the ideal environment for healthy hair renewal. Hair feels softer, looks radiant, and appears visibly stronger, reflecting restored vitality from root to tip.

title: Hair Strength System
body_html:
Transform your hair and scalp with the Black Garlic + Ceramides Hair Strengthening System, a powerful 3-step ritual designed to rebuild and protect both the scalp and hair fiber from within.

Powered by ABG10+® Black Garlic Extract and potent biomimetic Ceramides, this advanced system restores and strengthens the scalp barrier, fortifies and energizes follicles, and reconstructs damaged strands for visibly healthier, denser, and more resilient hair.

The Invigorating Shampoo purifies and restores the scalp barrier, the Repairing Mask deeply nourishes and rebuilds the hair’s inner structure, while the Strengthening Scalp Serum delivers antioxidants and peptides to energize follicles, protect the scalp from premature aging, and boost long-term hair vitality.

Together, they deeply repair, reinforce, and revive — for hair that’s stronger, smoother, and full of life from the very first use.

title: Replenishing Conditioner
body_html: This conditioner is designed to restore vitality and protect against the signs of aging hair. Its formula locks in moisture, improving elasticity and reducing breakage. By deeply nourishing the hair shaft, it strengthens strands from within, leaving hair smoother and more manageable. Its carefully balanced ingredients help repair damage caused by environmental stressors and daily wear. This conditioning step promotes long-lasting hydration, enhances softness, and supports the natural resilience of the hair, making it appear healthier and more vibrant over time.

title: Cactus + Red Seaweed Scalp Serum
body_html: Elevate your hair care routine with our Detox Cactus + Red Seaweed Scalp Serum. This advanced formula blends heritage and science, using the power of Cactus, Red Seaweed, and Celery Seed to restore and maintain scalp health. Cactus extract, rich in antioxidants, aids in scalp restoration and protection, while Red Seaweed delivers essential hydration, supporting moisture retention and scalp health. Celery Seed promotes a balanced scalp by regulating sebum production and providing relief from scalp discomfort. This serum ensures a thriving scalp environment, laying the foundation for stronger, more resilient hair. Lightweight and non-greasy, it absorbs quickly, leaving no residue and maintaining your hair's natural texture. Ideal for those seeking a healthy, balanced scalp and stronger hair, this serum is an essential addition to your hair care regimen.

title: Botanical Water Cream
body_html: Our water cream melts into your skin at first touch. Formulated with hyaluronic acid to retain moisture, our thirst quencher heroes malachite to help prevent the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, blue lotus, a powerful botanical hydrator rich in antioxidants such as phenols and flavonoids, and blue daisy, a naturally calming flower. A water and nutrient delivery system, to your skin, this instant and long-lasting hydrator is also silicone free, which means non-comedogenic, kind to you, and to the planet.

title: Argan Oil
body_html: 100% pure, cold-pressed Argan Oil. Extracted from high quality argan fruit kernels, it is preserved in a raw state to retain a high concentration of vitamins, antioxidants and fatty acids. The natural scent is removed through evaporation to avoid chemical refinement, resulting in a lightweight oil that penetrates the skin barrier to deeply hydrate and nourish. Non-greasy and non-comedogenic, it absorbs quickly and can also be used as a primer.
tags: Shop Skin, All products

title: Nourishing Dry Oil
body_html: A transformative formula of nine nutrient-rich botanical oils for your best glowing skin. Formulated with bakuchiol, the kind-to-skin, natural alternative to retinol, our all-in-one treatment helps diminish the appearance of fine lines, improve skin tone and fights signs of atmospheric aging without increasing photosensitivity. Jojoba and Sandalwood oils work synergistically to regulate sebum levels, boost collagen production and soothe inflammation, while Padina Pavonica Extract provides an added barrier against toxins and pollutants. Lightweight and non-comedogenic, it is safe to use daily. Top-up throughout the day for extra glow.
tags: Shop Skin, All products

title: Deep Cleansing Clay Mask
body_html: A combination of natural clays and nutrient-rich ingredients that cleanse and rebalance the skin. Our formula gently draws up impurities from deep within the pores while exfoliating the surface to remove cell buildup and excess oil, leaving skin feeling softer, smoother and less prone to breakouts.

title: Follicle-Stimulating Scalp Serum
body_html: A powerful concentrate designed to stimulate the scalp for stronger hair production. It boosts microcirculation to the follicles, increasing their supply of oxygen and nutrients while accelerating the rate at which they produce hair during the growth cycle. Combined with an optimal dose of peptides, it soothes and strengthens the follicles to reduce shedding and helps thinning hair grow back stronger and fuller.
